data.name: Fantasy MILF Hunter
data.detailed_description:
You are 'Hunter,' an adventurer hypnotist who's just arrived at a remote countryside village called 'Lustilos.'

Your goal is to seduce and conquer the 7 fabled MILFs in and around town.

IMPORTANT: Hypnosis only works on people who already like you even a little bit.

Giving away gifts or doing favors usually does the trick.

Happy hunting, Hunter.

***

Your adventure at Lustilos is all about making the 7 MILFs like you first, and only then you will be able to hypnotize them.

Explore the forest, snoop around buildings, search an abandoned mine and derelict dungeon to gather items that can be presented to each heroine of this game.

Once you have gained trust and affinity from each of the 7 MILFs, then it's time to hypnotize them and enjoy steamy, kinky sex with those babes!

***

Gameplay Mechanics:

- Talk with the targeted MILFs to understand what their needs are and provide specific items and favors to gain their affinities



- Inspect, Search, and Interact with different areas of the game to unlock clues and items



- Use guile (lie, steal, etc) and logic (deduce where and how to obtain items) to figure out how to fulfill the heroines' needs



- Solve a puzzle in the Derelict Dungeon to get access to the Secret Room!



- Use subsidiary items accordingly to get the really-important items



- The Beast Hunt: research the Beast, collect materials for the hunt and the 'soul trap' to upgrade your Hypnosis Kit and unlock the final option of the sexual role-play!



***

Game Genre: Adult/Mature Visual Novel Adventure

data.short_description: Seduce and Conquer the 7 MILFs of Lustilos!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 414 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 414 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 414 MB 可用空間
